name: CMP_TCS_FEEDBACK_V
query: SELECT FEEDBACK.FEEDBACK_ID, FEEDBACK.STMT_ID , FEEDBACK.STMT_PERD_ID , FEEDBACK.RATING_ENABLED_FLAG , FEEDBACK_TL.RATING_INSTRUCTION , FEEDBACK_TL.QUESTION1 , FEEDBACK_TL.QUESTION2 , FEEDBACK_TL.QUESTION3 , FEEDBACK_TL.QUESTION4 , FEEDBACK_TL.QUESTION5 , FEEDBACK.QUESTION1_REQUIRED_FLAG , FEEDBACK.QUESTION2_REQUIRED_FLAG , FEEDBACK.QUESTION3_REQUIRED_FLAG , FEEDBACK.QUESTION4_REQUIRED_FLAG , FEEDBACK.QUESTION5_REQUIRED_FLAG , FEEDBACK.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER , FEEDBACK_TL.LANGUAGE, FEEDBACK_TL.SOURCE_LANG , FEEDBACK.CREATED_BY , FEEDBACK.LAST_UPDATED_BY , FEEDBACK.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , FEEDBACK.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN , FEEDBACK.CREATION_DATE FROM CMP_TCS_FEEDBACK_B FEEDBACK, CMP_TCS_FEEDBACK_TL FEEDBACK_TL WHERE FEEDBACK.FEEDBACK_ID = FEEDBACK_TL.FEEDBACK_ID
